steps.explanation: The key tells us the value of each picture.

steps.instruction: Soccer has 4 stars. How many votes?
steps.explanation: Multiply the number of pictures by the key value.
Always check the key before counting.

title: Comparing Categories on a Picture Graph

steps.instruction: Each picture = 5 items. Apples: 3 pictures, Oranges: 5 pictures.
How many more oranges than apples?

steps.work: There are 10 more oranges than apples.
steps.explanation: Always convert to actual values before comparing.
